general.title: General Settings
general.subtitle: Basic information and preferences for your business

store.title: Store Settings
store.subtitle: Customize the appearance and details of your store

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Manage how and when you receive notifications

currency.title: Currency Settings
currency.subtitle: Manage currencies and exchange rate sources
currency.cup_section_subtitle: Select the exchange rate provider for the Cuban Peso (CUP). These sources are specific to Cuba.
currency.foreign_section_subtitle: Select the provider for international currency conversions (USD, EUR, etc.).
currency.cup_rate_source_subtitle: Select the exchange rate provider for the Cuban Peso (CUP). This applies to all products that accept CUP payments.
currency.no_foreign_sources: No sources available for foreign currencies
currency.use_global_description: The system will use the global source configured by the administrator
currency.select_source_description: Manually choose which provider your store will use
currency.info_box_body: Rates are updated daily. When a customer purchases in CUP, the system converts the product's base price using the current rate from the selected source.
currency.eltoque_description: Cuban informal market rate. Reflects the real buy/sell price in the market.
currency.bcc_description: Official rate from Cuba's Central Bank. Government-set price.
currency.openexchange_description: Global exchange rate source. Ideal for conversions between international currencies like USD, EUR, GBP, etc.
currency.exchangerate_api_description: Free alternative API for international exchange rates. 1000 requests/month on free plan.
currency.no_sources_available: No sources available at this time
currency.dashboard_pairs_subtitle: Select which currency pairs to display in the Currency Status block on your dashboard.

active_currencies.title: Active Currencies
active_currencies.subtitle: Manage which currencies are available for your store. Active currencies can be used when creating products and accepting payments.
active_currencies.no_active: No active currencies. Activate at least one to start using multi-currency features.
active_currencies.products_affected_desc: {count} product(s) are currently selling in {currency}. Choose what to do before deactivating.
active_currencies.no_migrate_warning: You will need to edit each product manually to remove this currency.
active_currencies.confirm_deactivate_desc: This currency will no longer be available for products or payments in your store.
